title: SpaceX rally adds $164 billion to Musk's fortune, more than Buffett's net worth
description: Shares of the space and artificial intelligence company surged 19.6% on Monday, adding an estimated $164 billion to Musk's net worth
content:
Elon Musk added more wealth in a single day than Warren Buffett has accumulated over a lifetime, as a blistering rally in newly listed SpaceX shares made him the world's first trillionaire.

title: Can AI help us age better? Bay Area scientists are trying to find out
description: Can AI help us age better? Discover how Bay Area labs are using advanced artificial intelligence models to predict biological age and target chronic diseases.
content:
A growing number of researchers are turning to artificial intelligence to understand why some people remain healthy into their 90s while others develop chronic diseases decades earlier.

title: Geo-political conflict, economic growth: List of topics PM Modi to speak on at G7 Summit in France
description: As per the Council of the European Union, the G-7 summit will focus on the future of artificial intelligence and balanced economic growth. However, geopolitical challenges such as the conflict in West Asia and free navigation, as well as the ongoing war in Ukraine will be discussed too.
